# learned-sql-injection-in-login-parameter

## Description
Auto-generated skill from SQL Injection Agent: SQL Injection in login parameter

## Technique
SQL error: Unclosed quotation mark

## Payload
```
?id=1' OR '1'='1--
```

## Remediation
Use parameterized queries

This skill was automatically created from a real finding during pentesting.
